use_cases: Background decoration for landing pages and hero sections
Subtle grid pattern for card and container backgrounds
Decorative layout element for web page sections
Highlighted grid squares for feature emphasis in product showcases
ai_summary: A minimal SVG grid pattern component that renders a customizable repeating grid background with optional highlighted squares. The component supports configurable width, height, position offsets, and stroke styling. It serves as a decorative background element commonly used in landing pages, hero sections, and card designs for various web applications.
